---
title: "Descriptive Statistics"
sidebar: english
---

## Mean or median? {#mean-or-median}

::: {.question-card}
An income distribution has a small number of extremely high values. Which measure better represents a typical income: the mean or the median? Why?

<details><summary>Reveal answer</summary>

The **median** usually represents the typical income better. Extreme values pull the mean upward, while the median is resistant to outliers.

</details>
:::
